title: Technical Support Engineer (Injection Molding I Plastics I Polymer I ASEAN I India)
description:
• MNC Company
  • Basic $4200 - $5500 + AWS + VB + Excellent Benefits
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working days: Monday to Friday
  • Working hours: 8.30am to 5.15pm
  • Jurong Island. Company Transport provided
  • Frequent travelling will be required

Job Responsibilities:

  • Provide overall technical solutions to customers which are not limited to products only but also the inclusion of tooling, and part design analysis i.e – CAE, and injection molding
  • Conduct market research on the latest technology trends related to the company’s current or future targeted applications
  • Plan and work together with the commercial team to create a mid-term plan as well as Long long-term plan business strategy on target application
  • Provide solution and technical support to the commercial team in meeting short-term budget targets
  • Plan and evaluate analysis methods about actual application requirements and needs to provide actual data to customers for application development
  • Obtain actual application requirements and translate these technical requirements into actual material properties for R&D to formulate new material.
  • Provide support in negotiating newly formulated material technical properties limitation with customers on specific application needs & requirements
  • Provide technical marketing activities in developing new markets and/or customers.
  • Provide technical training to all business partners such as Traders and/or Distributors on Engineering Polymer, technical training will be also extended to customers as and when requested.
  • Organized trade show to enhance product brand marketing.
  • Conducting molding trials with customers
  • Any other ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree and above in Polymer Science, Chemistry, or related field. Candidates with a Chemical background will also be considered.
  • Strong knowledge of polymers and plastics.
  • Knowledge with minimum 3 years experience in plastics injection molding and experience of chemical analysis for plastics or chemicals
  • Frequent travelling will be required for this position (ASEAN and India)

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


THIEN CHING MEI (R2198032)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
